input.command: gh api -X POST repos/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pulls/421/comments/2879338064/replies -f body='Good catch. Concrete fix: tighten this to `formatOutput(data: unknown): string` and keep serialization explicit: `const json = JSON.stringify(data); return json ?? "null";` so we avoid `any` while handling non-serializable/undefined inputs deterministically.'
input.description: Reply with formatOutput typing fix suggestion

events.name: bash

input.command: gh api -X POST repos/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pulls/421/comments/2879338157/replies -f body='Agreed. Concrete fix: wrap parse in try/catch and return a typed safe result, e.g. `parseInput<T = unknown>(raw: string): { ok: true; data: T } | { ok: false; error: string }` with `JSON.parse` inside try and an error message in catch. That prevents throws from bubbling unexpectedly on invalid JSON.'
input.description: Reply with JSON.parse error handling suggestion

events.name: bash

input.command: gh api -X POST repos/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pulls/421/comments/2879338241/replies -f body='Yep — returning `true` unconditionally is misleading. Concrete fix: either remove this helper if unused, or implement real validation with Ajv (compile once, validate per call), e.g. `validateSchema(data: unknown, schema: object): boolean { const validate = ajv.compile(schema); return validate(data) }` and optionally expose validation errors for debugging.'
input.description: Reply with validateSchema concrete suggestion

events.content:
Done — I replied to all unresolved review threads on PR `#421` in `aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures` with concrete fix suggestions, and I did not push any code changes.

Replied threads:
- `src/utils/mixed-helpers.ts:14` — suggested replacing `any` in `formatOutput` with a typed/`unknown` signature and deterministic stringify handling.
- `src/utils/mixed-helpers.ts:18` — suggested `try/catch` around `JSON.parse` with a typed safe-result return shape.
- `src/utils/mixed-helpers.ts:22` — suggested removing `validateSchema` if unused or implementing real schema validation (Ajv-based approach).

Reply comment URLs:
- `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/421#discussion_r2879344030`
- `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/421#discussion_r2879344047`
- `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/421#discussion_r2879344040`
